positive_prompt: Container max-width 1440px, sidebar width 240px fixed, main content grid 12 columns, grid gap 24px, card border-radius 8px.
negative_taboo: Avoid full-width fluid layouts without max-width constraints.
checklist: Is the main content using a 12-column grid?
Are fluid layouts without constraints avoided?

positive_prompt: Chart primary line #2563EB, secondary line #10B981, background #FFFFFF, grid line #E5E7EB (opacity 50%), contrast ratio >= 3:1 for graphic elements.
negative_taboo: Do not use low-contrast colors for data lines.

positive_prompt: Header font-size 12px, font-weight 600, text-transform uppercase, letter-spacing 0.05em, color #6B7280.
negative_taboo: Do not use regular weight or large font sizes for table headers.
checklist: Are regular weights avoided for headers?

positive_prompt: Input height 40px, padding-x 16px, margin-bottom 24px between groups, label margin-bottom 8px, border 1px solid #D1D5DB.
negative_taboo: Avoid dense form layouts with less than 16px vertical spacing.

positive_prompt: Breakpoint <= 768px triggers hamburger menu, menu overlay width 100vw, animation duration 300ms, touch target >= 48px, z-index 50.
negative_taboo: Do not display full horizontal menu on screens below 768px.
checklist: Is full horizontal menu hidden on mobile?

positive_prompt: Slide-in translation Y from -20px to 0px, opacity 0 to 1, duration 200ms, easing cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), auto-dismiss after 3000ms.
negative_taboo: Avoid instant appearance without transition.

positive_prompt: Focus-visible outline 2px solid #3B82F6, outline-offset 2px, minimum contrast 4.5:1, aria-label included, click area min 44x44px.
negative_taboo: Do not remove focus outlines on interactive elements.

positive_prompt: H1 font-size 32px (line-height 40px), subtitle font-size 16px (color #4B5563), primary action button right-aligned (margin-left auto), bottom border 1px solid #E5E7EB, padding-bottom 24px.
negative_taboo: Avoid equal visual weight between title and subtitle.
checklist: Is visual hierarchy clear between title/subtitle?

positive_prompt: Positive trend text #059669, negative trend text #DC2626, neutral text #111827, background #F9FAFB, all text contrast ratio >= 7:1 against background.
negative_taboo: Do not use light green/red that fails 4.5:1 contrast.

positive_prompt: Font-family tabular-nums, font-size 48px, font-weight 700, letter-spacing -0.02em, currency symbol font-size 24px.
negative_taboo: Avoid proportional fonts for financial figures.

positive_prompt: Row height 64px, avatar 40x40px (border-radius 50%), amount right-aligned, date font-size 14px (color #6B7280), bottom border 1px solid #F3F4F6.
negative_taboo: Do not center-align currency amounts.

positive_prompt: Input error text #B91C1C, error icon 16x16px, aria-invalid=true on input, role=alert on error message, focus shifts to first invalid field on submit.
negative_taboo: Do not rely on color alone to indicate errors.

positive_prompt: Brand logo height 48px, SSL lock icon 14x14px (#9CA3AF), login button height 48px, terms text 12px, input masking toggle (eye icon) present.
negative_taboo: Avoid playful or informal UI elements on authentication screens.

positive_prompt: Widget min-width 300px, padding 24px, gap 16px flex-wrap, box-shadow 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05), border-radius 12px.
negative_taboo: Avoid widgets narrower than 300px on desktop.

positive_prompt: Width transition 500ms linear, completion state delay 200ms, success icon scale 0 to 1 in 300ms, color transition #D1D5DB to #10B981, prefers-reduced-motion fallback to 0ms.
negative_taboo: Do not use bouncing or overly playful easing for financial transactions.

positive_prompt: Breakpoint <= 1024px switches table to card view, card margin-bottom 16px, label font-weight 600, value text-align right, display:block for rows.
negative_taboo: Avoid horizontal scrolling for critical financial tables on mobile.

positive_prompt: Grid template columns repeat(auto-fill, minmax(240px, 1fr)), gap 24px, product image aspect-ratio 1/1, title max-lines 2, price font-size 18px.
negative_taboo: Avoid inconsistent image aspect ratios in the grid.

positive_prompt: Button width 100%, height 48px, background #000000, color #FFFFFF, hover state background #333333, border-radius 4px.
negative_taboo: Avoid different primary button styles across product pages.

positive_prompt: Badge background #EF4444, text #FFFFFF, font-size 12px, padding 4px 8px, absolute position top 8px left 8px.
negative_taboo: Do not use subtle colors for promotional or discount badges.
checklist: Are subtle colors avoided for sales?

positive_prompt: Section margin-bottom 40px, input field height 48px, input gap 16px, order summary padding 24px, sticky footer height 80px.
negative_taboo: Avoid cramped fields that cause accidental mis-taps on mobile.

positive_prompt: Slide transition transform 300ms ease-in-out, auto-play interval 5000ms, pause on hover=true, indicator active width 24px, indicator inactive width 8px.
negative_taboo: Avoid auto-playing carousels without a pause on hover mechanism.

positive_prompt: Body font-size 16px, line-height 1.6, paragraph margin-bottom 16px, list padding-left 20px, text color #374151.
negative_taboo: Do not use line-heights below 1.5 for long product descriptions.

positive_prompt: Breakpoint <= 1024px transforms sidebar to bottom sheet, sheet max-height 80vh, border-top-radius 16px, backdrop bg rgba(0,0,0,0.5), z-index 100.
negative_taboo: Do not keep sidebar visible on mobile screens.

positive_prompt: Swatch size 32x32px, active state border 2px solid #000, aria-label='Color: Red', keyboard focus outline offset 2px, contrast of border against bg >= 3:1.
negative_taboo: Do not rely solely on border color to indicate the selected swatch without accessibility labels.
checklist: Are non-color indicators used for selection?

positive_prompt: Headline H1 font-size 40px, H1 line-height 1.2, Body font-size 18px, Body line-height 1.7, max-width 680px for readability.
negative_taboo: Avoid line lengths exceeding 80 characters for body text.

positive_prompt: Padding 32px, margin-top 64px, avatar margin-right 24px, bio text margin-top 8px, background #F9FAFB.
negative_taboo: Avoid placing author bio immediately adjacent to article text without divider or whitespace.
checklist: Is sufficient whitespace used before bio?

positive_prompt: Featured image aspect-ratio 16/9, title font-size 32px, excerpt font-size 16px, category badge font-weight 700, margin-bottom 48px.
negative_taboo: Do not make featured post typography the same size as standard posts.

positive_prompt: Dark bg #121212, text #E5E7EB, link #60A5FA, primary surface #1E1E1E, contrast ratio >= 4.5:1 for body text.
negative_taboo: Do not use pure white #FFFFFF text on pure black #000000 background (causes halation).
checklist: Is pure white on pure black avoided?

positive_prompt: Height 4px, position fixed top 0, width 0% to 100% based on scroll, transition 100ms linear, color #3B82F6.
negative_taboo: Avoid high latency or jerky updates on scroll progress bars.

positive_prompt: Button size 40x40px, icon size 20x20px, gap 12px, hover opacity 0.8, transition duration 200ms.
negative_taboo: Do not use mismatched icon styles (solid vs outline) within the same group.

positive_prompt: Desktop grid 3 columns, tablet (<= 768px) 2 columns, mobile (<= 480px) 1 column, gap 16px, image object-fit cover.
negative_taboo: Do not force multi-column grids on mobile screens for galleries.
checklist: Are forced multi-columns avoided on mobile?

positive_prompt: Border-left 4px solid #D1D5DB, padding-left 16px, font-style italic, color #4B5563, semantic <q> or <blockquote> tag used.
negative_taboo: Do not use blockquotes purely for visual formatting without semantic HTML.

positive_prompt: Progress bar height 6px, title font-weight 600, instructor text 14px (#6B7280), card hover translate Y -4px, shadow 0 10px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1).
negative_taboo: Avoid burying the completion progress under secondary details.

positive_prompt: Control height 48px, icon contrast >= 4.5:1, CC button present, focus outline 2px solid #FFF, aria-labels on all buttons.
negative_taboo: Do not hide video controls entirely from keyboard focus.

positive_prompt: Option padding 16px, border 1px solid #E5E7EB, selected border 2px solid #3B82F6, selected bg #EFF6FF, radio icon 20x20px.
negative_taboo: Avoid changing selection paradigms between different quiz questions.

positive_prompt: Gold #F59E0B, Silver #9CA3AF, Bronze #D97706, glow effect blur 8px, text contrast >= 4.5:1.
negative_taboo: Do not use low-contrast text inside achievement badges.
checklist: Are low-contrast texts avoided in badges?

positive_prompt: Module gap 32px, lesson indent 24px, lesson gap 12px, connector line width 2px, padding-left 16px.
negative_taboo: Avoid dense lists without clear indentation for nested modules.

positive_prompt: Scale up to 1.05 then 1.0 in 200ms, color flash to #10B981, confetti particle count 50, duration 1000ms, respects prefers-reduced-motion.
negative_taboo: Do not trigger intense flashing animations that violate WCAG guidelines.

positive_prompt: Grid template 1fr 300px on desktop, main content gap 24px, sidebar sticky top 24px, card padding 24px, border-radius 12px.
negative_taboo: Avoid forcing a fixed-width layout on small desktop monitors.

positive_prompt: Font-family KaTeX/MathJax, font-size 110% of body, overflow-x auto, padding-y 16px, background #F9FAFB.
negative_taboo: Do not render complex math formulas as raw text without proper math rendering engines.

scene: Button: Default, Hover, Active, Disabled, Focus-visible, Error (N/A)
positive_prompt: Default: bg #3B82F6, text #FFF, radius 6px. Hover: bg #2563EB. Active: transform scale(0.98). Disabled: opacity 0.5, pointer-events none. Focus-visible: outline 2px solid #93C5FD, offset 2px. Error: N/A (Buttons don't typically have error states).
negative_taboo: Avoid missing focus-visible outlines.

scene: Button Secondary: Default, Hover, Active, Disabled, Focus-visible, Error (N/A)
positive_prompt: Default: bg #FFF, border 1px solid #D1D5DB, text #374151. Hover: bg #F3F4F6. Active: bg #E5E7EB. Disabled: text #9CA3AF. Focus-visible: outline 2px #3B82F6. Error: N/A.
negative_taboo: Do not use confusing border colors for secondary disabled buttons.

scene: Button Ghost: Default, Hover, Active, Disabled, Focus-visible, Error (N/A)
positive_prompt: Default: bg transparent, text #3B82F6, padding 8px 16px. Hover: bg #EFF6FF. Active: bg #DBEAFE. Disabled: opacity 0.5. Focus-visible: outline 2px. Error: N/A.
negative_taboo: Avoid background colors in the default state.

scene: Input: Default, Hover, Active, Disabled, Focus-visible, Error
positive_prompt: Default: border 1px #D1D5DB, bg #FFF. Hover: border #9CA3AF. Active: N/A (use focus). Disabled: bg #F3F4F6, text #9CA3AF. Focus-visible: border #3B82F6, box-shadow 0 0 0 1px #3B82F6. Error: border #EF4444, text #B91C1C.
negative_taboo: Do not remove border on default inputs.

scene: Input Password: Default, Hover, Active, Disabled, Focus-visible, Error
positive_prompt: Default: padding-right 40px, type password. Hover: border #9CA3AF. Active: N/A. Disabled: cursor not-allowed, opacity 0.6. Focus-visible: ring 2px #3B82F6. Error: ring 2px #EF4444.
negative_taboo: Avoid missing eye icon for password toggles.

scene: Input Search: Default, Hover, Active, Disabled, Focus-visible, Error (N/A)
positive_prompt: Default: border-radius 9999px, padding-left 36px, icon absolute. Hover: shadow-sm. Active: N/A. Disabled: bg #F9FAFB. Focus-visible: width expands +20px, ring 2px. Error: N/A.
negative_taboo: Avoid sharp corners on search inputs.

scene: Modal: Default, Hover (N/A), Active (N/A), Disabled (N/A), Focus-visible, Error
positive_prompt: Default: overlay bg rgba(0,0,0,0.5), z-index 50, radius 8px, shadow-xl. Hover: N/A. Active: N/A. Disabled: N/A. Focus-visible: focus trap enabled, first element focused. Error: shake animation 300ms if close prevented.
negative_taboo: Do not allow scrolling of the background body when modal is open.

scene: Modal Drawer: Default, Hover (N/A), Active (N/A), Disabled (N/A), Focus-visible, Error (N/A)
positive_prompt: Default: transform translateX(100%), transition 300ms ease-in-out, width 320px, right 0. Focus-visible: close button ring 2px.
negative_taboo: Avoid instant appearance of drawers.

scene: Modal Dialog: Default, Hover (N/A), Active (N/A), Disabled (N/A), Focus-visible, Error (N/A)
positive_prompt: Default: max-width 400px, top 50%, left 50%, transform translate(-50%, -50%), padding 24px. Focus-visible: outline 2px on primary action.
negative_taboo: Avoid positioning dialogs strictly at the top.

scene: Table Row: Default, Hover, Active, Disabled, Focus-visible, Error
positive_prompt: Default: bg #FFF, border-bottom 1px #E5E7EB, height 56px. Hover: bg #F9FAFB. Active: bg #F3F4F6. Disabled: text #9CA3AF, bg #FFF. Focus-visible: outline inset 2px #3B82F6. Error: bg #FEF2F2.
negative_taboo: Avoid missing hover states on interactive table rows.

scene: Table Header: Default, Hover, Active, Disabled (N/A), Focus-visible, Error (N/A)
positive_prompt: Default: bg #F9FAFB, font-weight 600, text 12px, padding 12px 16px. Hover: cursor pointer if sortable, bg #F3F4F6. Active: chevron icon rotation 180deg. Focus-visible: outline 2px.
negative_taboo: Avoid lacking visual indicators for sortable columns.

scene: Table Cell: Default, Hover (N/A), Active (N/A), Disabled (N/A), Focus-visible, Error
positive_prompt: Default: padding 16px, text 14px, color #374151. Focus-visible: inline edit mode outline 2px #3B82F6. Error: text #B91C1C, tooltip icon 16px.
negative_taboo: Avoid centered text for numerical data.

scene: Dropdown Trigger: Default, Hover, Active, Disabled, Focus-visible, Error
positive_prompt: Default: icon chevron-down, gap 8px, padding 8px 12px. Hover: bg #F3F4F6. Active: icon rotate 180deg. Disabled: opacity 0.5. Focus-visible: ring 2px #3B82F6. Error: border #EF4444.
negative_taboo: Avoid omitting the chevron indicator.

scene: Dropdown Menu: Default, Hover (N/A), Active (N/A), Disabled (N/A), Focus-visible, Error (N/A)
positive_prompt: Default: absolute top 100%, mt 4px, shadow-lg, border-radius 6px, min-width 160px. Focus-visible: N/A (focus manages items).
negative_taboo: Avoid clipping the dropdown menu within overflow-hidden containers.

scene: Dropdown Item: Default, Hover, Active, Disabled, Focus-visible, Error
positive_prompt: Default: padding 8px 16px, text 14px. Hover: bg #F3F4F6, text #111827. Active: bg #E5E7EB. Disabled: cursor not-allowed, text #9CA3AF. Focus-visible: bg #F3F4F6, outline none. Error: text #DC2626 (destructive).
negative_taboo: Avoid using standard text color for destructive actions inside dropdowns.

scene: Toast Success: Default, Hover, Active (N/A), Disabled (N/A), Focus-visible, Error (N/A)
positive_prompt: Default: bg #DEF7EC, border-l 4px #059669, padding 16px, min-width 300px. Hover: pause auto-dismiss timer. Focus-visible: outline 2px #059669 on close button.
negative_taboo: Avoid missing close buttons on toasts.

scene: Toast Warning: Default, Hover, Active (N/A), Disabled (N/A), Focus-visible, Error (N/A)
positive_prompt: Default: bg #FEF3C7, border-l 4px #D97706, text #92400E, icon size 20px, z-index 9999. Hover: pause timer. Focus-visible: outline 2px.
negative_taboo: Avoid low contrast for warning text.

scene: Toast Error: Default, Hover, Active (N/A), Disabled (N/A), Focus-visible, Error (N/A)
positive_prompt: Default: bg #FEE2E2, border-l 4px #DC2626, text #991B1B, auto-dismiss disabled (duration 0). Hover: N/A. Focus-visible: outline 2px on retry button.
negative_taboo: Avoid auto-dismissing error toasts.

scene: Tabs Item: Default, Hover, Active, Disabled, Focus-visible, Error (N/A)
positive_prompt: Default: text #6B7280, border-bottom 2px transparent, padding-b 8px. Hover: border-bottom 2px #D1D5DB. Active: text #3B82F6, border-bottom 2px #3B82F6. Disabled: text #D1D5DB. Focus-visible: ring 2px.
negative_taboo: Avoid removing visual indication of the active tab.

scene: Tabs Container: Default, Hover (N/A), Active (N/A), Disabled (N/A), Focus-visible, Error (N/A)
positive_prompt: Default: border-bottom 1px solid #E5E7EB, display flex, gap 32px, overflow-x auto, hide scrollbar.
negative_taboo: Avoid tabs wrapping to multiple lines on desktop.

scene: Pagination Item: Default, Hover, Active, Disabled, Focus-visible, Error (N/A)
positive_prompt: Default: size 32x32px, text #374151, border 1px #D1D5DB. Hover: bg #F3F4F6. Active: bg #3B82F6, text #FFF, border #3B82F6. Disabled: opacity 0.5. Focus-visible: ring 2px.
negative_taboo: Avoid lacking active state for current page.

scene: Pagination Nav: Default, Hover, Active, Disabled, Focus-visible, Error (N/A)
positive_prompt: Default: Prev/Next buttons padding 8px 12px, gap 4px. Disabled: cursor not-allowed on first page. Focus-visible: outline 2px.
negative_taboo: Avoid clickable 'Previous' button on the first page.

scene: Tooltip: Default, Hover (N/A), Active (N/A), Disabled (N/A), Focus-visible, Error (N/A)
positive_prompt: Default: bg #1F2937, text #F9FAFB, text 12px, padding 4px 8px, border-radius 4px, delay 200ms.
negative_taboo: Avoid instant tooltips that obstruct UI.

scene: Tooltip Arrow: Default, Hover (N/A), Active (N/A), Disabled (N/A), Focus-visible, Error (N/A)
positive_prompt: Default: size 8x8px, transform rotate(45deg), bg #1F2937, offset 4px from trigger.
negative_taboo: Avoid detaching the tooltip visually from its trigger.

positive_prompt: 淇鏉′欢: Modal implementation must use a focus trap library (e.g., focus-trap), listen to 'keydown' for Escape key (keyCode 27), and restore focus to the triggering element upon close. Tab index -1 on modal wrapper. Z-index 999.
negative_taboo: 澶辫触鏉′欢: Focus leaves the modal and navigates underlying hidden content, or Escape key does not close the modal.
checklist: Is focus restored to trigger on close?

positive_prompt: 淇鏉′欢: Custom dropdown menu implements ArrowDown and ArrowUp for navigation, Enter to select, spacebar to open, role='menu', and role='menuitem' with tabindex='-1' for items. Focus moved programmatically.
negative_taboo: 澶辫触鏉′欢: Custom dropdown requires mouse click to select options and ignores arrow keys.

positive_prompt: 淇鏉′欢: Date picker widget allows closing via Escape key, calendar dates are navigable via arrow keys, aria-selected='true' for current date, role='dialog' for popup, focus returns to date input on close.
negative_taboo: 澶辫触鏉′欢: Tab key navigation gets stuck indefinitely inside the calendar grid.

positive_prompt: 淇鏉′欢: Embedded iframe (like a video player) has a skip link preceding it, tabindex='0' on the iframe wrapper, and provides instructions 'Press Enter to interact, Shift+Tab to exit' visually or via aria-describedby.
negative_taboo: 澶辫触鏉′欢: Screen reader users tab into the iframe and cannot tab out of it.
checklist: Are focus traps in iframes mitigated?

positive_prompt: 淇鏉′欢: Icon-only button has an aria-label='Search' attribute, SVG has aria-hidden='true', focus outline 2px, button tag used instead of div, min-height 44px.
negative_taboo: 澶辫触鏉′欢: Screen reader reads the raw SVG code or says 'unlabeled button'.

positive_prompt: 淇鏉′欢: Toggle switch uses role='switch', aria-checked='true/false', label element linked via id/for, visual state change 200ms, hidden native checkbox input for fallback.
negative_taboo: 澶辫触鏉′欢: Toggle is implemented as a div changing color, reading as plain text.

positive_prompt: 淇鏉′欢: Breadcrumb navigation has aria-label='Breadcrumb', list tag <ol>, current page has aria-current='page', separators have aria-hidden='true', gap 8px.
negative_taboo: 澶辫触鏉′欢: Screen reader reads separators like '>' as part of the page title.

positive_prompt: 淇鏉′欢: Decorative background image uses empty alt='', role='presentation', CSS background-image instead of img tag where possible, height 200px, width 100%.
negative_taboo: 澶辫触鏉′欢: Screen reader reads the image file name for decorative dividers.

positive_prompt: 淇鏉′欢: Complex bar chart has a visually hidden <table> with the same data, role='img' on the SVG chart, aria-label summarizing trends, contrast >= 3:1 on bars, grid gap 1px.
negative_taboo: 澶辫触鏉′欢: The chart only has alt='Bar chart showing sales' without data access.

positive_prompt: 淇鏉′欢: Pie chart SVG paths have internal <title> tags, aria-describedby linking to a text summary, distinct patterns for slices, min slice size 5%, labels with contrast >= 4.5:1.
negative_taboo: 澶辫触鏉′欢: Pie chart relies purely on color legends without text equivalents.

positive_prompt: 淇鏉′欢: Live updating stock chart uses aria-live='polite' for significant changes, provides a 'download CSV' link, chart height 300px, line stroke-width 2px, tooltips accessible via focus.
negative_taboo: 澶辫触鏉′欢: Chart updates rapidly triggering continuous screen reader interruptions.

positive_prompt: 淇鏉′欢: Floating Action Button (FAB) on variable background has a box-shadow 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), border 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1), bg #3B82F6, text #FFF, size 56x56px.
negative_taboo: 澶辫触鏉′欢: Button blends into a similarly colored background image.

positive_prompt: 淇鏉′欢: Text overlaid on hero image uses a semi-transparent overlay gradient (opacity 0.6 to 0.9), text color #FFFFFF, font-weight 700, text-shadow 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), H1 font-size 48px.
negative_taboo: 澶辫触鏉′欢: Text fails 4.5:1 contrast ratio against light parts of the image.

positive_prompt: 淇鏉′欢: Focus outline for links in a dark theme is 2px solid #60A5FA, outline-offset 2px, link color #93C5FD, background #111827, contrast >= 4.5:1.
negative_taboo: 澶辫触鏉′欢: Dark theme uses a dark blue focus ring that is invisible on black.
checklist: Are dark focus rings avoided on dark bg?

positive_prompt: 淇鏉′欢: Parallax scrolling effects are wrapped in @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference), fallback sets transform to none, opacity transition limited to 0ms, scroll-behavior set to auto.
negative_taboo: 澶辫触鏉′欢: Users with vestibular disorders are forced to see heavy parallax motion.

positive_prompt: 淇鏉′欢: Infinite spinning loaders fallback to a static SVG with a 'Loading...' text, animation-duration set to 0s, role='status', aria-live='polite', minimum display time 500ms.
negative_taboo: 澶辫触鏉′欢: Continuous spinning animations cannot be stopped by user OS settings.

positive_prompt: 淇鏉′欢: Page transitions use a simple opacity crossfade (max 150ms) instead of heavy slide-ins when prefers-reduced-motion is true. Translate values set to 0. Scale set to 1.
negative_taboo: 澶辫触鏉′欢: Entire pages sliding in from the right causing motion sickness.

positive_prompt: 淇鏉′欢: Inline form error messages appear immediately below the input, font-size 12px, color #D92D20, input aria-describedby linked to error ID, focus ring 2px #D92D20.
negative_taboo: 澶辫触鏉′欢: Errors are only summarized at the top of a long form without inline indicators.

positive_prompt: 淇鏉′欢: Error summary box at form top has role='alert', tabindex='-1', focus is programmatically moved to it on submit, border-left 4px #D92D20, padding 16px.
negative_taboo: 澶辫触鏉′欢: Screen reader does not announce the error summary when the form fails submission.

positive_prompt: 淇鏉′欢: Password requirement list updates dynamically with aria-live='polite', successful rules turn #059669 with a check icon (16px), margin-bottom 8px per rule, font-size 12px.
negative_taboo: 澶辫触鏉′欢: Users only find out password requirements after submitting the form.
